page_metadata.biotools__summary: An automated Protein Structure Prediction Pipeline (PSPP) based on multiple structure prediction tools.  A key component of the pipeline is the fold recognition program, PROSPECT.  Server supports genome scale analyses.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An automated Protein Structure Prediction Pipeline (PSPP) based on multiple structure prediction tools.  A key component of the pipeline is the fold recognition program, PROSPECT.  Server supports genome scale analyses.
